context_text: I think I can swim to the shore and pull the raft after me, if you will only hold fast to the tip of my tail."

context_text: Then the Lion began to swim with all his might toward the shore.

context_text: They were all tired out when they reached the shore at last and stepped off upon the pretty green grass, and they also knew that the stream had carried them a long way past the road of yellow brick that led to the Emerald City.

context_text: He laughed, when he came to the top of the water, and swam in to shore.
